name: Peanut Butter Candy Squares
recipeIngredient: 7 oz Marshmallow Creme, from a jar
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the rice cereal on a jelly roll pan measuring 15 1/2 X 10 1/2 X 1 inch in an oven set to 350 degrees F for 10 minutes.
2. In the top of a double boiler, combine the butter, marshmallow creme, and peanut butter. Place over hot water and stir until melted. Remove from heat.
3. Transfer the cereal to a large bowl that has been greased with butter.
4. Pour the peanut butter mixture evenly over the cereal and mix well.
5. Turn the mixture into an aluminum foil-lined baking pan measuring 9 inches square.
6. Press the mixture into an even layer.
7. Allow to cool, then cut into 36 squares measuring 1 1/2 inches each.
